audit_items.proof_trace: Property requires all callers to NULL-check ber_strdup_x result before dereference. Counterexample: ldif_open_url (fetch.c:71) does not check return value before passing to strchr (line 76) and ldap_pvt_hex_unescape (line 80), leading to NULL pointer dereference on allocation failure.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker submits LDIF file with 'include:' directive, causing memory exhaustion; ber_strdup returns NULL, leading to crash via strchr(NULL) or dereference in ldap_pvt_hex_unescape.
